name: Novee
oneliner: AI penetration testing platform with a purpose-trained attack AI that continuously probes enterprise AI systems for novel vulnerabilities — counter-AI-cyberattack infrastructure.
finserv: No explicit finserv evidence. General enterprise security positioning.
team: Ido Geffen, Gon Chalamish, Omer Ninburg — national-level offensive security leaders. Proprietary model outperforms Gemini 2.5 Pro and Claude Sonnet by 55%+ on exploitation benchmarks. Backed by YL Ventures, Canaan Partners, Zeev Ventures.
thesis: Novee's purpose-trained attack AI represents a new category — adversarial AI as a service — that every organisation deploying AI agents will eventually require. Raised $51.5M within 4 months of founding: fastest funding trajectory in Israeli cyber.
